# fly_wireguard_peer (Resource)

Manages a WireGuard peer for a Fly.io organization. Import using org_slug/peer_name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_wireguard_peer" "office" {
  org_slug   = "my-org"
  region     = "iad"
  name       = "office-vpn"
  public_key = "your-wireguard-public-key"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the WireGuard peer. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `org_slug` (String) The organization slug. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `public_key` (String) The WireGuard public key. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `region` (String) The region for the WireGuard peer. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `network` (String) The network for the peer. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `endpoint_ip` (String) The WireGuard endpoint IP address.
- `gateway_ip` (String) The gateway IP address.
- `id` (String) Synthetic identifier (org_slug/name).
- `peer_ip` (String) The assigned peer IP address.
